steps.t: The Baths of Belecthor can be found in the northern part of the Fourth Circle. Círgon has asked you to join him at the Baths of Belecthor where he sai…
Círgon is standing at the Baths of Belecthor in the Fourth Circle. You have arrived at the Baths and should now talk to Círgon.
Círgon's cart can be found near the Baths of Belecthor in the Fourth Circle. Círgon has offered to let you place one of his ships into the Baths.
The Baths of Belecthor can be found to the north in the Fourth Circle. You have picked up one of Círgon's ships and should now place it in the Baths.
Círgon is standing at the Baths of Belecthor in the Fourth Circle. You have set down the ship in the Baths and should now talk to Círgon.
Mílien can be found outside her home in the Fourth Circle. Círgon has asked you to tell his mother that he will come home for supper once he finishes …
